commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads generated-bundle metadata into ChatGPT attachment readiness, relaxes stem-only matching for Oracle-generated `attachments-bundle` uploads, and adds browser expression/prompt tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head shows a generated expected `attachments-bundle.txt` would match `attachments-bundle(13).md` at the stem-only branch before extension validation; a focused expression test can reproduce it without a live browser.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can adjust the generated-bundle matcher and add the missing regression without a product decision.

target.title: Relax generated bundle attachment readiness
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes a browser-mode attachment readiness edge case for Oracle-generated browser bundles.

ChatGPT can expose bundled uploads as a visible chip with only `attachments-bundle` or a duplicate-renamed label like `attachments-bundle(13).txt`. The pre-send gate should accept that for Oracle's generated `attachments-bundle.txt` / `.zip` files, but should not relax matching for arbitrary user files.

## Changes

- Marks Oracle-generated `attachments-bundle.txt` / `.zip` expectations explicitly.
- Adds a stem-only fallback only for those generated bundle files.
- Tightens filename boundary checks so embedded names like `not-attachments-bundle.txt` and same-stem different extensions like `attachments-bundle.md` do not satisfy the gate.
- Adds regression coverage for bundle stem matching, duplicate-renamed bundle chips, non-bundle stem rejection, embedded-name rejection, and same-stem different-extension rejection.
- Adds a changelog entry under `0.13.1 — Unreleased`.

## Real browser proof

Captured on a real logged-in ChatGPT browser profile on 2026-06-03 15:34 UTC, using a harmless generated bundle made from 12 tiny test files.

### Completed generated-bundle send path

Command shape:

`/usr/local/bin/oracle --engine browser --browser-model-strategy current --browser-manual-login --browser-attachments always --browser-bundle-files --browser-bundle-format text --browser-attachment-timeout 120s --prompt 'Harmless Oracle browser attachment proof...' --file [redacted-local-proof-dir]`

Redacted terminal excerpt:

```text
[verbose] Browser attachments: /tmp/[redacted]/attachments-bundle.txt
[browser] Bundled 12 files into /tmp/[redacted]/attachments-bundle.txt.
Uploading attachment: /tmp/[redacted]/attachments-bundle.txt
Attachment queued (UI anchored, file input confirmed)
Attachment wait state: {"state":"disabled","uploading":false,"filesAttached":true,"attachedNames":["remove file 1: attachments-bundle.txt","remove file 1: attachments-bundle.txt"],"inputNames":["attachments-bundle.txt"],"fileCount":0}
All attachments uploaded
Clicked send button
[browser] conversation url (post-submit) = https://chatgpt.com/c/[redacted]
Answer:
ORACLE_BUNDLE_PROOF_OK
Saved assistant output to /tmp/[redacted-output].md
```

### Duplicate-renamed real ChatGPT chip readiness

Read-only CDP inspection against real ChatGPT tabs with already-uploaded generated bundles showed the patched readiness expression returns true for duplicate-renamed chips while the send button is enabled. Prompt previews and conversation URLs are redacted.

```json
[
  {
    "attachmentLabels": ["remove file 1: attachments-bundle(15).txt"],
    "inputNames": ["attachments-bundle.txt"],
    "sendButtons": [{"aria":"Send prompt","testid":"send-button","visible":true,"disabled":false}],
    "readyForAttachmentsBundleTxt": true
  },
  {
    "attachmentLabels": ["remove file 1: attachments-bundle(14).txt"],
    "inputNames": ["attachments-bundle.txt"],
    "sendButtons": [{"aria":"Send prompt","testid":"send-button","visible":true,"disabled":false}],
    "readyForAttachmentsBundleTxt": true
  },
  {
    "attachmentLabels": ["remove file 1: attachments-bundle(13).txt"],
    "inputNames": ["attachments-bundle.txt"],
    "sendButtons": [{"aria":"Send prompt","testid":"send-button","visible":true,"disabled":false}],
    "readyForAttachmentsBundleTxt": true
  }
]
```


### Latest reviewer fix
- Scoped stem-only bundle readiness to attachments explicitly generated by Oracle instead of deriving it from basename alone.
- Added a collision regression where a normal user upload named `attachments-bundle.txt` with a stem-only chip and remove affordance does not satisfy readiness.
- Revalidated with focused browser tests, build, and format check.

## Validation

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm vitest run tests/browser/promptComposerExpressions.test.ts`
- `pnpm vitest run tests/browser/promptComposer.test.ts tests/browser/attachmentsCompletion.test.ts`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run format:check`
target.author: ig0rsky

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: ig0rsky
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
